'''''Challenge'' 70''' was a roleplaying magazine from [[June]] [[1993]]. It contained many roleplaying articles, including an adventure for the [[West End Games]] ''[[Star Wars]]'' [[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game|D6]] system. The article was called "[[Bantha Cannon]]" and was written by [[Chris Hind]].

{{Magazine-stub|issue}}
